breaking.title: School shooting in central Philippines leaves three dead, five injured
breaking.summary: A shooting at a school in central Philippines on Monday left three individuals dead. Authorities quickly arrested one suspect, who is a minor, while they continue their search for another assailant. The gunfire injured eight people, leaving five hospitalized. The police are diligently investigating the motives behind this tragic event as they attempt to locate the remaining suspect.

breaking.title: Video: Massive Fireball And Smoke After Explosion At Qatar Gas Facility
breaking.summary: Ras Laffan had already suffered significant damage during the US-Iran war

breaking.title: Drone scare over Moscow: Four airports shut, nearly 60 UAVs shot down
breaking.summary: Moscow's airspace faced disruption as air defence systems intercepted 59 drones targeting the capital, leading to a temporary shutdown of all four airports. This incident highlights ongoing cross-border attacks, with Russia having previously struck Ukraine's Odesa region with a ballistic missile, causing casualties and damage to an agricultural facility. The situation underscores the escalating tensions and the persistent threat of aerial assaults.

breaking.title: Tiruvallur ammonia gas leak: Death toll rises to five at seafood processing unit
breaking.summary: The police arrested the proprietor of the company and the factory manager, who both have a case pending against them for previous violations of industrial safety norms; Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay set up a three-member committee to probe the incident.

breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Iran Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says ‘major progress’ in U.S. talks
breaking.summary: Iran and the United States have agreed to set up a "de-confliction cell" with Lebanon to stop military operations

breaking.title: Decoupling footpaths from accidents
breaking.summary: Justice Narasimha’s judgment divorces the footpath from the theme of motor accidents. The sole objective of a footpath is not to avoid accidents. The pathways have an identity and a greater purpose of their own

breaking.title: Markets on edge as US-Iran ceasefire deal leaves investors rattled by uncertainty: Seth R. Freeman
breaking.summary: Despite a US-Iran ceasefire framework, markets remain volatile due to unresolved issues like Iran's nuclear program and the Strait of Hormuz.  While oil prices are sensitive, China's markets struggle with property woes. India, however, shows promise, potentially emerging as a long-term AI powerhouse. Investors are advised caution until a concrete, enforceable deal is reached.

breaking.title: NEET UG Re-Exam 2026: Solver Gang Busted In Lakhisarai, 9 Impersonators Among 30 Arrested
breaking.summary: Major Action Taken Against NEET UG Re Examination Cheating Scandal
